backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (ModeSelector label rename and bottom panel scroll) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite entry point main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that orchestrates file upload, mode selection, NLP analysis pipeline, graph rendering, and the tabbed Triplets/Taxonomy/Ontology data panels.
frontend/src/components/ExportButtons.ts: Three-button export toolbar (JSON, CSV, Excel) with per-button tooltips in Russian, delegating to exportUtils and managing per-export loading state.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop .xlsx upload component that parses the file via excelParser, displays loading/success/error states, and reports parsed intent group statistics.
frontend/src/components/Graph3D.tsx: Renders an interactive 3D knowledge graph using React Three Fiber with node meshes, edge lines, color-coded relation types, and hover/selection tooltips via OrbitControls.
frontend/src/components/GraphSelector.ts: UI component for switching between a meta-graph and individual intent-specific knowledge graphs, displaying node counts and styled active states.
frontend/src/components/ModeSelector.tsx: Toggle component for selecting between 'global' (unified) and 'intent' (per-group) analysis modes, with tooltips explaining each mode.
frontend/src/components/OntologyPanel.ts: Displays a filterable list of ontology entries with typed semantic relations, confidence scores, and color-coded relation labels with tooltip explanations.
frontend/src/components/TaxonomyPanel.ts: Renders a collapsible hierarchical taxonomy tree of extracted concepts with TF-IDF scores, supporting depth-based styling and expand/collapse interactions.
frontend/src/components/TooltipIcon.tsx: Reusable help icon component that wraps a HelpCircle button with a styled Radix UI Tooltip displaying arbitrary React content.
frontend/src/components/TripletsPanel.ts: React component that displays a filterable, sortable list of semantic triplets (Subject → Predicate → Object) extracted from a knowledge graph, with color-coded relation types and tooltip descriptions in Russian.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous access, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook for ICP apps, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all processing is client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark-themed OKLCH-based design token system with custom utility classes for colors, glows, and panel styles.
frontend/src/lib/excelParser.ts: Client-side XLSX parser that reads ZIP entries using the browser's DecompressionStream API, parses shared strings and worksheet XML, and converts spreadsheet data into structured intent groups with keyword queries and frequencies.
frontend/src/lib/exportUtils.ts: Utility module providing functions to export knowledge graph analysis results as JSON, CSV (triplets and ontology), or a pure-TypeScript-generated XLSX file with multiple sheets.
frontend/src/lib/forceLayout.ts: Implements a 3D spring-based force-directed graph layout algorithm that iteratively applies repulsion, edge attraction, and gravity forces to position graph nodes in 3D space.
frontend/src/lib/knowledgeGraph.ts: Builds knowledge graphs from entity/relation candidates using TF-IDF and co-occurrence data, and constructs a meta-graph representing cross-intent similarity via Jaccard overlap between intent graphs.
frontend/src/lib/nlpEngine.ts: Provides NLP pipeline functions including TF-IDF computation, co-occurrence matrix construction, and extraction of entity/relation candidates from a query corpus.
frontend/src/lib/ontology.ts: Builds an ontology by classifying graph edges into semantic relation types (hierarchical, functional, association, co-occurrence) based on TF-IDF and edge weight, with CSV export support.
frontend/src/lib/taxonomy.ts: Constructs a hierarchical taxonomy tree from a knowledge graph by scoring nodes via TF-IDF and degree centrality, assigning lower-scored nodes as children of top nodes, with CSV flattening support.
frontend/src/lib/textProcessor.ts: Provides text processing utilities—tokenization, normalization, and stop word removal—supporting both English and Russian stop word lists.
frontend/src/lib/triplets.ts: Extracts subject-predicate-object triplets from knowledge graph edges, ordering subject/object by TF-IDF score, with CSV export support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines all shared TypeScript interfaces and types for the application, including graph nodes/edges, triplets, taxonomy, ontology, and analysis results.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens (colors, shadows, fonts, animations) for the knowledge graph UI, using oklch color space and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 9) for a Knowledge Graph Builder web app on Caffeine.ai/Internet Computer, documenting features, architectural notes, and known issues. Describes an in-browser TypeScript app that processes .xlsx keyword files with TF-IDF, co-occurrence, 3D visualization, and export capabilities.
